chosen_action.title: Promote TLDL from generic website-only publisher discovery to a GitHub-issue-backed contact route

why_this_action.summary: The short review window is still active until 2026-05-26T08:57:00+02:00, so another live outbound action would mostly blur measurement. The highest-leverage same-run move was to strengthen the next Codeberg-first publisher lane by turning TLDL from a generic website/X-only target into a GitHub-issue-backed contact route discovered from its official FAQ.
verification: Execution board still had no truthful do-now asset inside the active short window and listed TLDL among the remaining non-runtime-sendable publisher targets.
Official TLDL FAQ says questions or feedback should go through GitHub or social media and links to https://github.com/shenli/tldl.
After the repair, refreshed discovery and publisher handoff artifacts expose https://github.com/shenli/tldl/issues/new as a concrete contact path for TLDL.

verification_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime
from agents.marketing import distribution_lane_executor as executor
now = datetime.now()
findings = executor._load_primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery()
executor._write_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet(now, findings)
executor._write_marketing_execution_board(now)
PY

expected_outcome: When the current short hold expires after 2026-05-26T08:57:00+02:00, the post-hold publisher lane has a concrete GitHub issue contact route for TLDL instead of a weaker generic website/social fallback.

measurement_window.success_metric: The first truthful post-hold publisher packet still includes TLDL with a GitHub issue contact path and can use it instead of generic website-only rediscovery.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the post-hold rerun still cannot surface a truthful executable publisher lane after this repair, escalate into another distribution architecture repair instead of logging another idle hold.
